title: Future Continuous Tense Practice
prompt: Write three sentences using the future continuous tense to describe what you will be doing next weekend.
hint: Use the structure: subject + will be + verb-ing. For example, 'I will be visiting my friend.'
sample: I will be studying for my exam. I will be cooking dinner. I will be watching a movie.

ja.prompt: 来週末に何をしているかを未来進行形で3文書いてください。
ja.hint: 構造は、主語 + will be + 動詞のing形です。例：'I will be visiting my friend.'
ja.sample: I will be studying for my exam. I will be cooking dinner. I will be watching a movie.

zh.prompt: 用未來進行式寫三句描述你下週末會做什麼的句子。
zh.hint: 句型結構：主詞 + will be + 動詞ing。舉例：'I will be visiting my friend.'
zh.sample: I will be studying for my exam. I will be cooking dinner. I will be watching a movie.

title: Talking about Future Travel Plans
prompt: Describe your future travel plans using the future continuous tense. Mention where you will be going and what you will be doing there.
hint: Use 'will be' + verb-ing to describe ongoing actions in the future. For example, 'I will be exploring the city.'
sample: I will be traveling to Paris next month. I will be visiting museums and trying local food.

ja.prompt: 未来の旅行計画を未来進行形で説明してください。どこに行くか、そこで何をするかを書いてください。
ja.hint: 'will be' + 動詞のing形を使って、未来の進行中の動作を表します。例：'I will be exploring the city.'
ja.sample: I will be traveling to Paris next month. I will be visiting museums and trying local food.

zh.prompt: 用未來進行式描述你的未來旅行計劃。說明你會去哪裡以及會做什麼。
zh.hint: 使用 'will be' + 動詞ing 來描述未來持續進行的動作。例如：'I will be exploring the city.'
zh.sample: I will be traveling to Paris next month. I will be visiting museums and trying local food.

title: Making Plans with Friends
prompt: Imagine you and your friends are planning a trip. Write a short dialogue using future continuous tense to discuss what each person will be doing during the trip.
hint: Use future continuous tense to describe ongoing actions. For example, 'I will be taking pictures.'
sample:
A: What will you be doing in New York?
B: I will be visiting the Statue of Liberty.
A: I will be shopping and trying new food.

ja.prompt: 友達と旅行の計画を立てている場面を想像し、未来進行形を使ってそれぞれが旅行中に何をするか話す短い会話を書いてください。
ja.hint: 未来進行形を使って進行中の動作を表現します。例：'I will be taking pictures.'
ja.sample:
A: What will you be doing in New York?
B: I will be visiting the Statue of Liberty.
A: I will be shopping and trying new food.

zh.prompt: 想像你和朋友正在計劃旅行。用未來進行式寫一段短對話，討論每個人在旅行中會做什麼。
zh.hint: 使用未來進行式描述持續進行的動作。例如：'I will be taking pictures.'
zh.sample:
A: What will you be doing in New York?
B: I will be visiting the Statue of Liberty.
A: I will be shopping and trying new food.
